Premise:
Imprisoned by a maniacal captor, Miles, and You are running out of time. Eddie’s delusions of a perfect wedding grow more obsessive by the day, but a twisted opportunity presents itself—a stag party. A distraction. If they can make Eddie believe it’s all part of his fantasy, fulfil his deepest desires and needs... they might just survive long enough to escape.

But as the night approaches, the danger grows. Eddie’s grip on reality is slipping, and their only hope lies in playing along with his madness. Can they convince him, or will this celebration become their final undoing?
